overall.description: A first-person walk through a rainy, neon-lit cyberpunk city at night. The player moves from street level past pedestrians with umbrellas, crosses an intersection with light traffic, and ascends to an elevated waterfront walkway before continuing along an industrial bridge with overhead pipes. Heavy rain and fog create atmospheric conditions typical of Night City in Cyberpunk 2077.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, passing pedestrians with umbrellas

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rainy cyberpunk city sidewalk at night, with a black metal fence on the left and neon billboards illuminating the fog. Pedestrians with umbrellas walk past in the opposite direction, while futuristic skyscrapers loom in the background.

events.description: leaving sidewalk and entering street crosswalk
black pickup truck drives through the intersection from right to left

agents.ego_description: crossing the wet street at the intersection, navigating around vehicles

notable_agents.action: black pickup truck driving through the intersection

entered.detail: yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing on wet asphalt
multi-story building with green neon accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection as the camera crosses the street. A black pickup truck passes through the intersection, and modern glass buildings with neon accents line the right side. The wet asphalt reflects the city lights as the camera moves toward an elevated walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated waterfront promenade with palm trees

events.description: ascending stairs to elevated walkway overlooking the canal

agents.ego_description: walking up stairs to elevated walkway, revealing the waterfront view

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with white umbrella walking along the promenade

entered.detail: wide waterway with reflections of neon city lights
white concrete safety barrier along the water edge
illuminated sign for El Coyote Cojo establishment on lower level

segments.scene_description: Ascending to an elevated waterfront promenade, the view opens to reveal a wide canal with neon reflections. Palm trees line the walkway, and the El Coyote Cojo sign is visible on a lower level. The camera moves along the railing overlooking the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial bridge walkway with overhead pipes

events.description: transitioning from open waterfront to covered bridge with industrial infrastructure

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered bridge walkway, following a pedestrian with a white umbrella

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with white umbrella walking ahead on the bridge

entered.detail: large metal pipes and industrial framework overhead
metal safety barrier along the bridge edge
tall modern street lights illuminating the bridge path

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to an industrial bridge walkway with large metal pipes overhead. The camera follows a pedestrian with a white umbrella along the concrete path, with street lamps providing illumination. The bridge offers a more enclosed, sheltered feeling compared to the open waterfront.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rainy, neon-lit city that transitions from a crowded street level to an enclosed industrial bridge. It begins on a sidewalk beside a black metal fence, moving past pedestrians with umbrellas under the glow of neon billboards and towering skyscrapers. As the camera crosses a wide intersection, the view opens to reveal wet asphalt reflecting city lights and a passing black pickup truck before shifting toward an elevated promenade. The scene then expands across a waterfront walkway lined with palm trees and neon-lit canals, offering a glimpse of the El Coyote Cojo sign below. Finally, the environment narrows as the camera moves onto an industrial bridge, following a pedestrian with a white umbrella beneath a canopy of large metal pipes and street lamps.
